title: Senior/Executive (Clinical Operations, public healthcare) #HCL
description:
Responsibilities:

·        Participate in workshops to provide input and insights throughout the planning and development process, aiming to optimize workflows and enhance user experience.

·        Assist in the development and planning of project timelines, infrastructure, and resources.

·        Collaborate with various teams, consultants, and stakeholders to define project goals and ensure alignment with strategic objectives

·        Facilitate meetings and workshops to gather input, define methodologies, and ensure all project requirements are addressed.

·        Help develop user requirements, guidelines, and processes, organizing sessions to test new models and approaches.

·        Assist in preparing business cases for project approval and securing necessary funding.

·         Track and monitor project progress, providing timely updates and escalating any concerns when necessary.

·        Prepare regular reports to update relevant stakeholders on project status and progress.

·        Coordinate activities related to the development and implementation of the project.

·        Support the implementation of operational models, ensuring alignment with project goals, budgets, and guidelines.

·        Organiz meetings, including booking venues, preparing agendas, taking minutes, and managing logistics.

·        Assist with procurement and payment processing as needed.

·        Perform additional tasks as assigned by the supervisor.

Requirements:

·        Bachelor’s degree in business, management, or a related field.

·        Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively at various organizational levels

·        Excellent organizational and time management skills.

·        Strong leadership potential, with the ability to motivate and support a team in achieving goals

·        Self-motivated, analytical, and capable of problem-solving.

·        Ability to manage multiple tasks and work well under pressure.

·        Proficient in using MS Office applications.

If you are interested in the position, do kindly drop your most updated resume to kaileylee@recruitexpress.com.sg 

KaileyLee Jia Yueh

EA Personnel No: R24126040

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifesciences Division)

EA License: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
